title: Notifications  - Update failed
scenario: Firmware update failure notification "Device didn't update" redirects to Poly Lens app software update failure screen when DFU interrupted within first 20%
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Ensure the connected Poly audio device has a pending firmware update available.
4. Initiate the firmware update (DFU) process from the app.
5. During the first 20% of the update process, turn off the Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power off).
6. Wait for the update process to fail and observe the app behavior.
7. Check for a notification on the Android device stating "Device didn't update".
9. Observe the screen that opens after tapping the notification.
expected: A notification "Device didn't update" is displayed. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app's software update failure screen.
